title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 15–18, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Your name is Captain Kuro

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: This tragedy was caused by you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: two...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: JANGO!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I am captain Kuro

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: This tragedy was caused by me. I am captain Kuro...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: ...and, you're the man who captured Captain Kuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: One, two, Jango!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: take him back to your base and have him executed

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: This is a perfect plan. Once the fake one is exe- cuted, Captain Kuro will dis- appear from this world....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I'm the man who captured Captain Kuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What Happ- Pened that day has been essential for today's plan to be successful...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: My plan can only be com- plate when I have obtained wealth and peace

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Do you under- stand, now, kid...?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I've spent three years doing this plan, it cannot fail!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I can't let you...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Disrupt my plans!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: HeeyaAAAAAAAAAAAAAA...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Hulah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: So, it seems you can do more than just stretch

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That's right! I've been training...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: To become a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Heeyah!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Ugh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa!! The "Cat's claws" are broken!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You said that you're sick and tired?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: If you're afraid of your name being known...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: ...then how can you be a pirate?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: My dreams are far greater than your plans!!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
